nodes.label: Graphify Agent Rule
nodes.description: Always-on rule directing agents to consult the graphify knowledge graph at graphify-out/ for codebase and architecture questions before falling back to raw source browsing.

nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge Graph
nodes.description: Persistent knowledge graph stored under graphify-out/ with graph.json, GRAPH_REPORT.md, and wiki/index.md, queried via CLI (query/path/explain) or MCP (query_graph/shortest_path/get_node).
